title: Biomolecular Engineering and Gene Regulation in Cellular Reprogramming
organisation: Institute of Pharmacy and Molecular Biotechnology
further_info: The preliminary meeting/introduction is currently scheduled for April 21, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. in INF 364, 5th floor seminar room, and online by appointment. The schedule will be determined during the preliminary meeting. The seminars will take place twice a week during the second half of the semester, tentatively on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 8:00 a.m. to 9:30 a.m. online.
